name: Chocolate Marshmallow Chow
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Add marshmallows, raisins, and chocolate chips to the melted margarine. Stir until combined.
3. Pour the mixture evenly over the Wheat Chex cereal in a serving dish or shallow bowl.
4. Gently toss the cereal and mixture together so that all pieces are coated.
5. Transfer the coated cereal and mixture to a paper bag.
6. Sprinkle powdered sugar over the top of the cereal mixture.
7. Shake the paper bag gently until the powdered sugar is evenly distributed, coating all cereal pieces.
Recipe By: THE DESSERT SHOW
Serving Size: 1 batch (9 cups)
Preparation Time: 15 minutes
